description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on workflow dispatch, push to master or v0.23.x branches, and pull requests to those branches, excluding certain paths. The workflow should have two jobs: build-linux and build-macos. The build-linux job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up ccache, installs dependencies, and performs a full build, unit tests, and mini build using meson. The build-macos job runs on macos-latest, sets up ccache, installs dependencies, and performs a build and unit tests using meson.
